PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court noted that it recently received an update that attorney Peter Bresler had recently suffered from health problems. Therefore, the court opted not to issue an Order to Show Cause regarding sanctions for failure to appear. The court continued the matter to May 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and will issue an Order to Appear for an attorney from the firm to appear at the next hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jun-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Bresler requested 60-days stating that he will do his best to clear the examiner's notes. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
At the court's query, Mr. Bresler offers an update on the status of the matter and confirms that his idea of filing a 13100 affidavit is not an option. Mr. Bresler requests a continuance to continue to work on this matter.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Apr-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Bresler is instructed to file his document before the next hearing.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Continued To Jan-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for Raymond To (petitioner).

Mr. Bresler stated that he is waiting for signatures from his client, and that his intentions are to go the Probate 13100 affidavit route. Petition for letters of administration is continued to January 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.
